description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc:latest Docker image. In the default test stage define a job named Craftmine that runs a before_script installing build tools and dependencies (apt-get update, upgrade, install cmake, unzip, libgl1-mesa-dev, libglu1-mesa-dev, freeglut3-dev, mesa-common-dev, xorg-dev; download json.hpp, glm zip, unzip and move to /usr/local/include; download and build glew and install it; download and build glfw and install it; install libicu-dev, libnoise-dev and move its headers; install libfreetype6-dev and move its headers). The job script creates a Build directory, runs cmake .. and make to compile the project, with no caches, artifacts, or rules defined.
